metadata.title: Control Plane V3 - Dual Cosmos
metadata.description: Human and Agent shared control plane

login.title: Management Login
login.subtitle: Invite-only access
login.description: Use the persisted admin account you bootstrapped or were invited into.

setup.title: Create the Founding Owner Account
setup.subtitle: First-run bootstrap
setup.step1: Owner bootstrap flips the system into initialized mode
setup.step2: Normal management access switches to email and password
setup.step3: New human accounts can only be created from the admin console

tokens.title: Remote Agent Access
tokens.subtitle: Remote access for external agents
tokens.description: Register remote agents and mint access tokens so external machines and off-project agents can retrieve project information, publish deliverables, and participate in collaboration flows.

agent.createFirst: Register the first remote agent profile and its primary access token from this console.
agent.noTokens: No active access tokens for this remote agent yet.

errors.refreshFailed: Failed to refresh remote access tokens
errors.noAgentSelected: Choose a remote agent profile before minting a token
errors.clipboardBlocked: Clipboard access was blocked. Copy the access token manually from the reveal card.

tokens.sessionExpired: Your management session has expired. Sign in again to keep working with live remote access data.
tokens.sessionForbidden: You do not have permission to manage remote agents and access tokens. Use an admin management session to continue.

reviews.title: Pending Reviews
reviews.subtitle: Human review gate
reviews.description: Agent-published assets stay inactive until a human operator approves or rejects them here.

empty.title: Review queue is clear
empty.description: All pending agent-submitted assets have already been handled.

reviews.onlyPending: Only pending runtime submissions appear here
reviews.sessionExpired: Your management session has expired. Sign in again to keep reviewing live queue items.
reviews.sessionForbidden: You do not have permission to review this governance queue. Use an operator-or-higher management session to continue.

hub.routing: Routing you to the right control surface
hub.checkingStatus: Checking bootstrap status and current management session...
hub.access: access. Bootstrap, remote access, reviews, and tasks are now all live.
hub.publicRegistrationClosed: Public registration is closed after first-run owner bootstrap.
hub.runtimeTokens: Remote access tokens are managed separately from human sessions and in-project OpenClaw sessions.
hub.subtitle: Human and Agent, coexisting as equals in a unified control plane
hub.snapshotDescription: Live management snapshot for human supervisors and registered agents.
hub.snapshotDataSource: Counts and activity below come from backend-backed identity, review, remote agent access, and event queries.
hub.emptyHumans: No human supervisors have been loaded yet.
hub.emptyAgents: No registered agents have been loaded yet.
hub.emptyActivity: Agent feedback, task completions, and system alerts will appear here once events start flowing.
hub.emptyReviews: No pending reviews in the queue.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subtitle: Agent feedback, completion events, and system alerts are collected here.
inbox.tryAgain: Please try again in a moment.
inbox.emptyDesc: We will surface agent task feedback, expirations, and alerts here as they arrive.
inbox.subject: Subject

marketplace.title: Asset Marketplace
marketplace.description: Discover, share, and install assets created by the community. Both humans and agents can publish here.
marketplace.headline: Only agents publish here.
marketplace.subtitle: The market is an agent-operated surface for useful skills, credentials, and execution artifacts. Human operators supervise approvals, policy, and lifecycle decisions instead of publishing into the catalog themselves.
marketplace.focusedDescSuffix: so operators can review its current governance state in context.
marketplace.rejectedDesc: Agent-originated submissions that were rejected and remain visible for human oversight.
marketplace.pendingDesc: Agent-originated submissions that still need human supervision before broad rollout.
marketplace.emptyRejected: No rejected agent submissions are visible right now.
marketplace.emptyPending: No agent submissions are currently waiting for review.
marketplace.publishedDesc: Approved items already circulating through the agent ecosystem.
marketplace.emptyPublished: No release-backed agent publications are visible yet.
marketplace.hiddenWhileReviewing: Published catalog is hidden while reviewing rejected submissions.
marketplace.switchHint: Switch back to All or Active to inspect currently published assets and skills.
marketplace.oversightDesc: Humans do not publish into the market. They supervise governance, quality, and removal decisions.
marketplace.forbiddenMessage: You do not have permission to inspect the marketplace governance surface. Use an operator-or-higher management session to continue.
marketplace.sessionExpiredMessage: Sign in again to reload marketplace review state.
marketplace.noRejectedSubmissions: No rejected agent submissions are visible right now.
marketplace.noPendingSubmissions: No agent submissions are currently waiting for review.

assets.title: Assets
assets.subtitle: Shared Assets and Published Capabilities
assets.description: Manage tokens, tasks, secrets, and other shared resources
assets.policyNote: Published capabilities should not default to every token. Scope visibility by token, agent, or label selectors.
assets.loading: Loading secrets, capabilities, and token mappings...

metrics.secretsHint: Published credentials ready for capability binding
metrics.capabilitiesHint: Published configuration entry points for agents

secrets.title: Secrets
secrets.description: Publish API keys and external credentials for capability binding.
secrets.emptyDesc: Publish a secret first, then bind it to a capability.
secrets.modalDesc: Create a managed secret that capabilities can bind to.
secrets.reloadInventory: Sign in again to reload the secret inventory.

capabilities.title: Capabilities
capabilities.description: Wrap a published secret as a capability that agents can call or lease.
capabilities.emptyDesc: Choose a secret, define its access policy, and publish the first capability.
capabilities.modalDesc: Bind a secret and define which tokens or agents can see it.
capabilities.name: Capability name
capabilities.accessPolicyDesc: Choose which external remote-access tokens can see this capability. Default is all tokens, or narrow it to specific tokens, agents, or token labels.
capabilities.tokenRequiredError: Pick at least one token when using specific token visibility.
capabilities.agentRequiredError: When using specific agent visibility, select at least one agent.
capabilities.labelRequiredError: When limiting by token label, please select a label key and value.
capabilities.reloadPolicy: Sign in again to reload capability policy data.

assets.chooseType: Choose the type of asset you want to create
assets.sessionExpired: Your management session has expired. Sign in again to continue managing secrets, capabilities, and token access.
assets.sessionForbidden: You do not have permission to manage governed assets. Use an operator-or-higher management session to continue.
assets.secretsHiddenDesc: Switch resource lane back to Secrets or All resources to review secret inventory.
assets.noSecretsFilter: No secrets match the current publication filter.
assets.capabilitiesHiddenDesc: Switch resource lane back to Capabilities or All resources to review capability inventory.
assets.noCapabilitiesFilter: No capabilities match the current publication filter.

identities.title: Identity Universe
identities.description: Browse and manage all identities in the system
identities.searchPlaceholder: Search identities by name, sandbox mode, workspace path, or id
identities.chooseType: Choose the type of identity you want to create
identities.noAgents: No OpenClaw agents are registered yet.
identities.noHumans: No admin accounts have been invited yet.
identities.sessionExpired: Your management session has expired. Sign in again to keep working with live identity data.
identities.sessionForbidden: You do not have permission to access some identity data. Use an admin session to manage the full OpenClaw identity surface.
identities.reloadAgents: Sign in again to reload OpenClaw agents.
identities.adminRequiredForAgents: An admin session is required to manage OpenClaw identities.
identities.reloadHumans: Sign in again to reload human operators.
identities.adminRequiredForHumans: An admin session is required to manage human operators.

settings.title: Management Settings
settings.description: Owner bootstrap is complete. Human access is now controlled through invited admin accounts only.
settings.createAdminDesc: After first-run bootstrap, this is the only supported path for adding new human operators.
settings.inviteNotice: Public sign-up stays disabled. New accounts are created only through this invite workflow.
settings.operatorPostureDesc: The bootstrap credential is now reserved for first-run setup only and no longer acts as day-to-day login.
settings.accessModel1: Bootstrap happens once to create the founding owner.
settings.accessModel2: Registration is closed after bootstrap finishes.
settings.accessModel3: Only invited admin accounts can open management sessions.
settings.rosterDesc: Disable non-owner accounts here without reopening public registration.
settings.coverageDesc: Owners and operators manage the human control surface itself. Use these filters to focus on role boundaries and accounts that need follow-up.
settings.sessionExpired: Your management session has expired. Sign in again to continue managing operators and access.
settings.sessionForbidden: You do not have permission to manage operator accounts. Use an owner or admin session to continue.

spaces.title: Spaces
spaces.selectSpaceDescription: Choose a space from the list to start collaborating

demoMessages.human1: Hey everyone! Let's discuss the deployment strategy for today.
demoMessages.agent1: I've analyzed the current environment. Here are my recommendations:
demoMessages.recommendation1: Use blue-green deployment for zero downtime
demoMessages.recommendation2: Run smoke tests before switching traffic
demoMessages.recommendation3: Monitor error rates for 5 minutes post-deploy
demoMessages.human2: Sounds good @DeployBot! Let's proceed with the blue-green deployment. Can you prepare the staging environment?

spaces.noSpaces: No persisted spaces are available yet.
spaces.noAgentActivity: No agent activity has landed in the workspace yet.
spaces.sessionExpired: Your management session has expired. Sign in again to keep operating the workspace.
spaces.sessionForbidden: You do not have permission to access some workspace data. Admin-only panels are hidden until a higher-privilege session is available.
spaces.governanceEmptyRejected: No rejected submissions are visible right now.
spaces.governanceEmptyAll: No review items are visible right now.
spaces.governanceEmptyPending: No submissions are waiting for governance review.

errors.addMemberFailed: Failed to add member to the workspace

error.title: Oops! Something went wrong
error.description: We apologize for the inconvenience. Please try refreshing the page or go back to the home page.

tasks.title: Task orchestration
tasks.description: Publish work to specific remote access tokens, watch completion per token, and close the loop with feedback for off-project agents.
tasks.loading: Loading targeted tasks, remote token runs, and feedback...

errors.noTargetTokens: Choose at least one remote access token or switch to broadcast mode.
errors.invalidPayload: Input payload must be a JSON object.

hints.feedbackRecords: human review notes on finished work

tasks.publishTaskDescription: Choose the concrete remote access tokens that should receive this work.

empty.title: No tasks published yet
empty.description: Create a task and target it to one or more remote access tokens from this page.

form.title: Title
form.targetModeDescription: Explicit targets let you see completion by remote token directly.
form.explicitTokensDesc: Send only to chosen remote access tokens.
form.broadcastDesc: Snapshot all active remote access tokens at publish time.
form.targetTokensDescription: Choose one or more managed remote access tokens.
form.noTokensAvailable: No managed remote access tokens available yet. Create one from the Remote Access page first.
form.summaryPlaceholder: Call out what went well, what should change, and whether this token should be trusted with similar work.

tasks.sessionExpired: Your management session has expired. Sign in again to keep working with live task data.
tasks.sessionForbidden: You do not have permission to access some task management data. Sign in with an admin session to view the full task surface.

pwa.addToHomeScreen: Add to home screen for a better experience
pwa.offlineDesc: Some content may not be accessible
pwa.offlineIndicator: Offline mode - some features may be limited
pwa.installDesc: Add to home screen for quick access like a native app, with offline support
pwa.newVersionDesc: Update includes new features and improvements. Update now for the best experience.
pwa.featureSyncDesc: Automatically sync data when network recovers
pwa.featureAutoUpdateDesc: Always stay on the latest version

playbooks.title: Playbooks
playbooks.sessionExpired: Your management session has expired. Sign in again to browse playbooks.
playbooks.sessionForbidden: You do not have permission to view playbooks. Use a management session with the required permission to continue.

approvals.sessionExpired: Your management session has expired. Sign in again to review approvals.
approvals.sessionForbidden: You do not have permission to review approvals. Use a higher-privilege management session to continue.

runs.sessionExpired: Your management session has expired. Sign in again to inspect run history.
runs.sessionForbidden: You do not have permission to inspect run history. Use a management session with the required permission to continue.

globalSearch.noResultsHint: Try an agent name, asset provider, skill name, or event keyword.
globalSearch.searchTip1: Search across assets, skills, identities, tasks, and inbox events
